title: Background
text:
Hi
I’m Eliot and I’m doing a jamboree in Poland. This is my website that keeps track of the miles i’ve raised as i try to achieve my fundraising target.

title: About my journey
text: I’m an explorer who has been given the privilege of attending the jamboree on behalf of my local area. I’ve been involved in scouts since young and am very excited to be travelling abroad and having the chance to represent my troop at a global event. I look forward to the challenge of raising money to fund this trip.
